indexPolicy.titlePolicy: session titles are not read, generated, summarized, or emitted by this fixture
indexPolicy.pathPolicy: no session-store, transcript, model, user, or workspace paths are configured, read, or emitted
indexPolicy.refreshPolicy: future refresh requires an explicit reviewed local session-store boundary

emptyState.userVisibleSummary: Show an empty local session index without reading a store.

indexControls.label: open session index
indexControls.userAction: Open the local chat session list surface.
indexControls.launcherAction: Render deterministic empty index state from checked fixture data.

indexControls.label: refresh session index
indexControls.userAction: Refresh only after a reviewed local session-store boundary exists.
indexControls.launcherAction: Refuse refresh because no manifest read boundary exists.

indexControls.label: select session
indexControls.userAction: Select only a future indexed local session.
indexControls.launcherAction: Keep selection disabled because the index is empty.

indexControls.label: restore selected session
indexControls.userAction: Restore only after a session manifest boundary exists.
indexControls.launcherAction: Refuse restore because no indexed session exists.

indexControls.label: rename session
indexControls.userAction: Rename only after explicit local store and title policy review.
indexControls.launcherAction: Keep rename disabled because no session title exists.

indexControls.label: delete session
indexControls.userAction: Delete only a future launcher-owned local session.
indexControls.launcherAction: No-op because no indexed session or local store exists.

blockedReasons.summary: No reviewed local chat session store exists.
A checked session manifest shape is required before list items can be read.
Session titles, summaries, prompts, and responses remain outside checked fixture data.
No launcher-owned local chat session is active or selectable.
Refreshing a real index requires an explicit artifact-read boundary and tests.

handoffRefs.summary: Base chat/session surface is referenced without message content.
Lifecycle restore, clear, close, and export actions remain disabled or blocked.
Transcript persistence and export remain disabled.
Readiness gates stay separate from index display state.

limitations: Data-only chat session index fixture; no real session store is configured or read.
No session titles, summaries, prompts, responses, transcripts, manifests, model paths, generated artifacts, private paths, secrets, or tokens are stored.
No artifacts are read, written, deleted, refreshed, imported, exported, or persisted.
No KV260 hardware access, serial access, network call, provider call, telemetry, upload, or write-back is performed.
Selection, restore, rename, delete, and refresh controls remain disabled, unavailable, inactive, or blocked until explicit evidence and reviewed boundaries exist.
This is not a release, tag, versioned compatibility commitment, MCP, LSP, IDE, marketplace, telemetry, or session-store implementation.
